message.content:
This section (Pages 15–31) provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of the overseas mobile game market status from 2022 to 2025, structured to support retrieval queries on market scale, regional dynamics, product rankings, and strategic development frameworks.

**Topics & Scope:** Global and regional (US, Japan, Korea, HKTW) mobile game revenue trends, download volume shifts, platform ecosystem migration, new vs. legacy product lifecycle strategies, regulatory impacts on app distribution/payments, and market concentration by ranking tiers.
**Entities & Dates:** Centers on 2022–2025 market data with a primary focus on 2025 performance. Key entities include Apple App Store, Google Play, major publishers/developers (Supercell, NetEase, NEXON, 点点互动, First Fun, etc.), and flagship titles (《皇室战争》, 《奔奔王国》, 《燕云十六声》, Last War: Survival, Pokemon TCG Pocket, etc.).
**Definitions & Procedures:** Defines the "overseas market" scope as excluding mainland China, tracking only direct user spending (excluding ad monetization/third-party top-ups). Outlines developer procedures: prioritizing App Store product page optimization, localization, and editorial feature acquisition; executing "sub-gameplay" saturated marketing campaigns; and calibrating resource allocation based on tiered revenue concentration and outlier impact.
**Claims & Insights:** Asserts that overall market revenue growth remains flat while download share shifts significantly from Google Play to the App Store. Legacy product revival requires deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction of core progression and economic systems, whereas new title breakthroughs depend on micro-innovations within validated models. Original AAA releases are nearly absent in 2025, positioning IP and proven commercial models as core assets to hedge market uncertainty. Regional claims highlight US/Japan dominance (>50% combined share), Korea's policy-driven MMORPG surge (new releases occupy >50% of TOP 10), and HKTW's market preference shift from casual to mid-core/deep gameplay products.
**Tables & Figures:** Contains structured ranking tables: "2025 Overseas Mobile Game Revenue TOP 30", "2025 New Product Revenue TOP 16", and regional TOP 10/New Product lists for the US, Japan, Korea, and HKTW. Visualizations include bar charts (annual revenue scale, platform revenue splits, tier concentration), line charts (YoY growth rates, monthly revenue trends, DAU tracking, adjusted baseline comparisons), and annotated game screenshots.
**Metrics:** Tracks annual revenue (亿元), download volumes (亿次), platform share percentages, YoY growth rates (ranging from -6.21% to +122.37%), and tier-based revenue distribution (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others). Specific title metrics include Clash Royale 2025 revenue (~45亿元, +94.8% YoY), Kingshot monthly revenue trajectory (peaking ~6.5亿元 in Dec 2025), and regional totals: US (165.84亿元), Japan (112.98亿元), Korea (51.36亿元), HKTW (36.46亿元). 《燕云十六声》 metrics include 40M cumulative players, 250k Steam peak CCU, and China App Store DAU (400k–1M).
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative market data, proprietary ranking tables, statistical visualizations, platform performance metrics (Steam sales rankings, App Store chart positions, user review scores), corporate financial reports, expert interviews, and judicial/policy documentation. All primary statistical data and charts are sourced from 点点数据 (Diandian Data) independent research and modeling.

    *0065, 0066 (Regional Revenue Distribution):*

    - Figures: Bar charts (platform split, total revenue ranking).
    - Claims: US+JP dominate; HK/TW stable in TOP10; Europe faces high barriers.
    - Evidence: Diandian Data charts.

    *0067, 0068, 0076, 0077 (US Market Deep Dive):*
    - Topics: US market scale, revenue concentration by tier/genre, impact of third-party payments.
    - Entities: Apple App Store, Google Play, Roblox, Fortnite, major publishers.
    - Dates: 2021-2025, 2025 policy enforcement.
    - Metrics: US revenue 2021-2025 (174.0B to 165.84B), YoY growth, tier shares (Top 1-10, 11-50, etc.).
    - Tables: US TOP 10 & New Product TOP 10 (Rank, Title, Publisher, Revenue, YoY, Launch Date).
    - Claims: Player consumption security affects niche revenue potential. Court ruling on third-party payments shifts market from platform-centric to service-diversified.
    - Figures: Bar/line charts for revenue/growth, tier concentration.
    - Evidence: Judicial/policy reference, Diandian Data.

    *0078, 0079, 0080, 0081 (Japan Market Deep Dive):*
    - Topics: Japan market scale, regulatory impact (sideloading/third-party payments), IP vs. gameplay competition.
    - Entities: Japan, 《智能手机特定软件竞争促进法》, Pokemon TCG Pocket, FGO, Last War, etc.
    - Dates: 2021-2025, Act effective Dec 18, 2015 (note: likely a typo in source, but I'll stick to what's stated or generalize to regulatory timeline), 2025 analysis.
    - Metrics: 2025 revenue 112.98B (+4.21% YoY). Tier shares: Top 10 (27.6%), 11-50 (31.45%).
    - Tables: Japan TOP & New Product TOP lists.
    - Claims: Legacy titles sustain revenue via IP/community. Competition act mandates openness. Dual-track competition (IP adaptation vs. gameplay-driven) dominates.
    - Figures: Revenue/growth chart, concentration chart.
    - Evidence: Diandian Data, policy analysis.

    *0082, 0083, 0084, 0085 (Korea Market Deep Dive):*
    - Topics: Korea market resilience, policy shifts, MMORPG dominance, new release surge.
    - Entities: South Korea, NEXON, Netmarble, Lineage M, I9, etc.
    - Dates: 2021-2025.
    - Metrics: 2025 revenue 51.36B. Tier shares: Top 10 (33.19%).
    - Tables: Korea TOP 10 & New Product TOP 10.
    - Claims: Socio-political disruptions didn't break market roots; policy pivot to support boosted PC IP MMORPGs. New releases >50% of TOP 10 (historically rare), indicating MMORPG demand saturation/overconsumption.
    - Figures: Revenue/growth chart, tier concentration chart.
    - Evidence: Diandian Data, policy analysis.

    *0086, 0087, 0097, 0098 (HK/Macau/TW Market Deep Dive):*
    - Topics: HKTW market scale, competitive landscape, shift from casual to mid-core/deep gameplay.
    - Entities: HK, Macau, TW, Star City Online, Frostborn, Last War, Pokemon TCG, etc.
    - Dates: 2021-2025.
    - Metrics: 2025 revenue 36.46B (+0.99% YoY). Tier shares stable.
    - Tables: HKTW TOP & New Product TOP lists.
    - Claims: "Stable top, strengthened mid-tier" drives balance. Casual game UA红利 faded; market favors mid-core, strong IP, deep progression.
    - Figures: Revenue/growth charts, tier concentration, game screenshots.
    - Evidence: Diandian Data.

    *0099, 0100, 0101 (Case Study: 《燕云十六声》):*
    - Topics: Product case study, market positioning, global breakout.
    - Entities: 《燕云十六声》, NetEase, Steam, App Store.

    - Figures: DAU line chart, monthly revenue bar chart.
    - Claims: Unique historical positioning overcame skepticism; high-quality content enabled cross-cultural appeal.
    - Evidence: Platform rankings, review scores, official charts.

3.  **Synthesize & Structure the Parent Summary:**
    I need to weave these into a cohesive, retrieval-oriented summary that covers the parent section's scope (pages 15-31). I'll structure it logically:
    - **Overview/Scope:** What the section covers (overseas mobile game market status, 2022-2025).
    - **Global/Overall Market Trends:** Revenue scale, download shifts, platform dynamics (App Store vs Google Play), new vs legacy product strategies.
    - **Regional Breakdowns:** US, Japan, Korea, HKTW (revenue, growth, platform preferences, regulatory impacts, tier concentration).
    - **Product Rankings & Case Studies:** TOP lists (overall & new), specific deep dives (Clash Royale, Kingshot, 《燕云十六声》), strategic claims (IP vs gameplay, micro-innovation, deep reconstruction).
    - **Data & Evidence:** Consistently mention Diandian Data (点点数据), specific tables/figures, metrics, and dates.
    - **Retrieval Focus:** Explicitly state what queries this section answers.

    I will draft it carefully, ensuring all constraints are met. I'll group by logical themes rather than just listing child nodes.

Core claims differentiate legacy product revival (requiring deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction of core systems) from new title breakthroughs (relying on micro-innovations within proven models and saturated marketing). 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot) is identified as the sole new release in the overall TOP 30.

Covers platform preferences (Japan iOS ~70%, Korea Google Play ~80%), regulatory impacts (US third-party payment mandates, Japan's sideloading/competition act, Korea's policy pivot to industry support), and market concentration trends across ranking tiers (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others).     - **Evidence & Data Sources:** All quantitative metrics, rankings, and visualizations are sourced from 点点数据 (Diandian Data) proprietary research, supplemented by corporate financial reports, expert interviews, judicial/policy references, and platform performance data. The section contains multiple structured tables (revenue rankings, new product lists), bar/line charts (market scale, growth rates, tier concentration, DAU/revenue trends), and strategic frameworks for product development and market positioning.

response_text:
This section (Pages 15–31) provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of the overseas mobile game market status from 2022 to 2025, structured to support retrieval queries on market scale, regional dynamics, product rankings, and strategic development frameworks.

**Topics & Scope:** Global and regional (US, Japan, Korea, HKTW) mobile game revenue trends, download volume shifts, platform ecosystem migration, new vs. legacy product lifecycle strategies, regulatory impacts on app distribution/payments, and market concentration by ranking tiers.
**Entities & Dates:** Centers on 2022–2025 market data with a primary focus on 2025 performance. Key entities include Apple App Store, Google Play, major publishers/developers (Supercell, NetEase, NEXON, 点点互动, First Fun, etc.), and flagship titles (《皇室战争》, 《奔奔王国》, 《燕云十六声》, Last War: Survival, Pokemon TCG Pocket, etc.).
**Definitions & Procedures:** Defines the "overseas market" scope as excluding mainland China, tracking only direct user spending (excluding ad monetization/third-party top-ups). Outlines developer procedures: prioritizing App Store product page optimization, localization, and editorial feature acquisition; executing "sub-gameplay" saturated marketing campaigns; and calibrating resource allocation based on tiered revenue concentration and outlier impact.
**Claims & Insights:** Asserts that overall market revenue growth remains flat while download share shifts significantly from Google Play to the App Store. Legacy product revival requires deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction of core progression and economic systems, whereas new title breakthroughs depend on micro-innovations within validated models. Original AAA releases are nearly absent in 2025, positioning IP and proven commercial models as core assets to hedge market uncertainty. Regional claims highlight US/Japan dominance (>50% combined share), Korea's policy-driven MMORPG surge (new releases occupy >50% of TOP 10), and HKTW's market preference shift from casual to mid-core/deep gameplay products.
**Tables & Figures:** Contains structured ranking tables: "2025 Overseas Mobile Game Revenue TOP 30", "2025 New Product Revenue TOP 16", and regional TOP 10/New Product lists for the US, Japan, Korea, and HKTW. Visualizations include bar charts (annual revenue scale, platform revenue splits, tier concentration), line charts (YoY growth rates, monthly revenue trends, DAU tracking, adjusted baseline comparisons), and annotated game screenshots.
**Metrics:** Tracks annual revenue (亿元), download volumes (亿次), platform share percentages, YoY growth rates (ranging from -6.21% to +122.37%), and tier-based revenue distribution (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others). Specific title metrics include Clash Royale 2025 revenue (~45亿元, +94.8% YoY), Kingshot monthly revenue trajectory (peaking ~6.5亿元 in Dec 2025), and regional totals: US (165.84亿元), Japan (112.98亿元), Korea (51.36亿元), HKTW (36.46亿元). 《燕云十六声》 metrics include 40M cumulative players, 250k Steam peak CCU, and China App Store DAU (400k–1M).
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative market data, proprietary ranking tables, statistical visualizations, platform performance metrics (Steam sales rankings, App Store chart positions, user review scores), corporate financial reports, expert interviews, and judicial/policy documentation. All primary statistical data and charts are sourced from 点点数据 (Diandian Data) independent research and modeling.
